result:
The audit is complete. Both output files are written:

- `/workspace/.workstream-results/wc-2026-packages-hx-tokens-issues.jsonl` — 42 JSONL issue records
- `/workspace/.workstream-results/wc-2026-packages-hx-tokens-report.md` — Full markdown report

---

## Audit Summary — `packages/hx-tokens`

**42 total issues** | Critical: 2 | High: 17 | Medium: 17 | Low: 6

### CRITICAL (2)

| # | Issue |
|---|-------|
| 1 | **Focus ring contrast 1.24:1 on white** — `focus.ring-opacity: 0.25` composites primary-400 to near-invisible contrast. Even at full opacity, primary-400 achieves only 2.54:1 — below the 3:1 WCAG SC 1.4.11 minimum. Every keyboard-interactive component is affected. |
| 2 | **Package exports map points to `.ts` source files** — `files` field publishes `dist/` but all 4 export conditions point to `src/*.ts`. The compiled `dist/*.js` files exist and are correct but are unreachable. Breaks all non-TypeScript consumers (Drupal CDN, plain Node.js, npm publish). |

### HIGH highlights (17)

- **3 WCAG SC 1.4.3 contrast failures** in light mode: `text.on-secondary` (3.68:1), `text.on-success` (3.30:1), `text.on-info` (4.10:1) — all below the 4.5:1 AA minimum for normal text
- **`color.accent` = `color.warning`** — byte-for-byte identical across all 11 scale steps (runtime confirmed). Patient-safety risk in clinical dashboards
- **`easing.in-out` uses the wrong cubic-bezier** — identical to `easing.default`, not a symmetric in-out curve
- **`color.focus-ring` duplicates `focus.ring-color`** but only one is overridden in dark mode — theming inconsistency
- **Zero test files** — package invisible to Turborepo test pipeline; `turbo test` silently skips it
- **`getContrastColor` broken for 3-char hex** — runtime confirmed: `getContrastColor('#fff')` returns `'#ffffff'` (wrong)
- **`lit.ts` css() TemplateStringsArray hack** — bypasses Lit's CSS injection safeguard; `unsafeCSS()` is the correct API
- **`lit` as runtime dependency** instead of `peerDependency` — forces Lit on consumers of `./utils` and `./css`
- **Missing `sideEffects: false`** — prevents tree-shaking across all bundlers

### Key MEDIUM issues (17)

- `transition.*` tokens hardcode `'ease'` keyword instead of `var(--hx-easing-default)` — easing and transition systems disconnected
- `breakpoint` and `container` categories duplicate 4 identical pixel values
- `opacity.disabled` and `opacity.overlay` duplicate scale token values (should reference them)
- No schema validation of `tokens.json` at build time — CSS injection surface in 3 code paths
- `generate-css.ts` has no error handling, is excluded from type-checking, and duplicates flatten logic from `src/index.ts`
- Missing healthcare-specific clinical status tokens (`color.status.critical/high/moderate/normal/low`)
- Turborepo build outputs missing `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` — incremental compilation cache never restored
- CI matrix tests Node 18 despite `engines: >=20`
